name: Aggression Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar and margarine in a large bowl. Squeeze, smash, and beat until well mixed.
2. Add the rolled oats, baking powder, and flour to the mixture. Mix until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Form the dough into balls about the size of a walnut.
4. Flatten each ball with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
5. Place the cookie balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and allow to cool on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 12-15 dozen cookies (large batch). These freeze well for weeks.
